description: Style NoteGive your outfit a stylish spin with these black shoes from gliders. Their cushioned inner lets you stay on your feet for hours. Pair it with a T-shirt and shorts for a casual outing.Product Details Round toed, grey black shoe with lace up fasteningMetal eyeletsSynthetic faux snake skin upper with overlays and reinforced heel collarRed, white and green piping detail at mid-footSemi-cushioned insole and tongue Foam-rubber mid-sole and TPU outsoleTerraced concentric grooves on outsole Branding at heel, tongue and lateral side of shoeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean and damp cloth to remove dust
